vulnerabilities.name: Missing Expiration
vulnerabilities.description: The token does not have an expiration time, making it valid indefinitely

vulnerabilities.name: Weak Algorithm
vulnerabilities.description: The token uses HS256 which can be vulnerable to brute force attacks if the secret is weak

vulnerabilities.name: Privilege Escalation
vulnerabilities.description: The token contains admin privileges which could be exploited if signature verification is bypassed
